ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the game */,
  "team1" TEXT /* Team 1 */,
  "team2" TEXT /* Team 2 */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of Team 1 */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of Team 2 */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2 FOREIGN KEY ("team2") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1 FOREIGN KEY ("team1") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of pass attempts */,
  "pass_completions" INTEGER /* Number of pass completions */,
  "pass_yards" INTEGER /* Number of pass yards */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rush attempts */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Number of rush yards */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Number of receiving yards */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the player's performance in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_season_year FOREIGN KEY ("season_year") REFERENCES games ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_position_name FOREIGN KEY ("position_name") REFERENCES players ("position")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., NFL, MLB, NBA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_league_name FOREIGN KEY ("league_name") REFERENCES teams ("league")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
